name: chr3_3p26_CHL1_SD
description: 3p26 subtelomeric SD cluster around CHL1 and CNTN6 paralogs. Recurrent 3p26 microdeletions/duplications (including 3pter monosomy) have breakpoints in this SD belt; phenotype includes intellectual disability and autism-spectrum features.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SDs of 20-100 kb at 90-98% identity shared with other subtelomeres; CHL1, CNTN6, CNTN4 unique genes; CNTN5/6 paralog signal extends into the duplicons.
